platform_desc: Intel PTL 12Xe iGPU (12 Xe cores × 8 EU × 10 threads), 2400 MHz, 110 GB/s
config_summary: INT4 g128 matmul + INT8 g128 LM_head + INT8 KV cache, PA opencl+micro_kernel; multimodal: Thinker text decoder (36-layer dense GQA), Audio encoder (32-layer MHA), Vision encoder (27-layer SigLIP MHA), Talker (28-layer dense GQA) + code2wav.
